ethical_guardrails: Reward learning behavior rather than fear of loss.
Use streak freezes and recovery quests to reduce shame after missed days.
Avoid dark patterns, pay-to-win mechanics, loot boxes, and hidden odds.
Cap grindable rewards to protect learner wellbeing.
Make progress meaningful through mastery, projects, and confidence.
core_loop: Return through a humane streak nudge

lesson_completion.notes: Award on meaningful lesson completion with at least one interaction.

coding_challenge.notes: Scale by difficulty and reward clean first-pass solutions.

daily_login.notes: Small nudge only; learning actions carry the real value.

streak_bonus.notes: Bonus triggers at milestones, not with pressure loops.

peer_help.notes: Encourage community support with daily anti-farming caps.

spending_methods.balancing_note: Useful but not required; hints teach strategy.
Protects habit without punishing missed days.
Extra practice, no exclusive curriculum gating.
Can also be earned through project milestones.
Cosmetic wrapper around free project templates.

balancing_rules: A consistent learner should afford one hint token every 2-3 lessons.
Streak freezes are intentionally expensive enough to feel valuable but not punitive.
Core learning content is never locked behind coins.
Coins should drain mostly through optional support and cosmetics.
Daily caps prevent repetitive low-value farming.

weekly.reset_behavior: Weekly streak counts successful weeks, not perfect attendance.

monthly.reset_behavior: Monthly streaks reset each calendar month with a summary, not a loss message.

comeback_quest.requirement: Complete one 10-minute review after a missed day.
